rationale.rules-based-checks: Deterministic static pre-publish scanner: regex, JSON parse, config invariants, gate
rationale.ai-code-insecurity: Original five-category operational-security taxonomy plus Claude Code leak incident analysis
rationale.framework: Modular reusable pre-publish pipeline architecture; focused single-concern (VibeGuard exemplar)
rationale.built-system: Implemented tool, public repo, run on eight projects
rationale.agentic: Vibe-coded whole artifacts; oversight surface is the publish gate
rationale.risk-security: Contributes and evaluates a security-vulnerability mitigation; measured recall/precision
